2022-23 UCF Knights Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 19-15 (8-10, 7th in AAC MBB)

Coach: Johnny Dawkins

PS/G: 71.5 (182nd of 363)

PA/G: 65.5 (48th of 363)

SRS: 11.09 (56th of 363)

SOS: 5.09 (86th of 363)

ORtg: 105.5 (159th of 363)

DRtg: 96.6 (55th of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000
